title: 2. Building Forms and Processing Input Paybacks

blocks.content: To capture parameters from the user securely, agents construct forms using the A2UI input widgets. When the user submits, a callback request payload is routed back to the agent session.
This schema defines a user settings form with a text input, selection dropdown, and a submit button:
When the button is clicked, the UI generates a callback payload containing values from the input fields:
Question 1: What format does A2UI use to return user-entered form data to the agent?

- A) As a raw text message containing prompt inputs.
- B) As a structured JSON callback envelope mapping input IDs to values.
- C) As a CSV spreadsheet export.
Feedback: Option B is correct. Data collected from A2UI forms is returned in a structured JSON callback payload with the input values mapped to control IDs.
